text: Here's what science actually says about critical periods learning. Critical periods are windows in development where learning is most effective. Think of language skills in infants—miss that window, and it's tougher to catch up. Research shows these phases exist for skills like music and visual perception too! But not all studies are conclusive. So, learning during these periods can shape not just skills, but brain structure. Want to dive deeper into learning science? Follow for more insights!
